tasks.title: Trial launch engineering gates and auth readiness evidence
acceptance: Records current evidence for pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, and first-release readiness gates.
Records auth mock-disabled evidence without changing auth runtime code or production configuration.
Updates release readiness report with Pass, Fail, Blocked, or Not verified status for each gate.
Documents skipped checks with reason and required human approval when applicable.
Does not modify business code, migration, seed, auth runtime, CI, Docker, deploy, or production config.

tasks.title: Trial launch leasing finance idempotency and audit evidence
acceptance: Runs or documents safe execution of contract, receivable, payment, invoice, waiver, idempotency, and audit checks.
Produces finance readiness evidence that maps each result to the production readiness matrix.
Documents any write-path data marker and cleanup approach before running local or pre-production smoke.
If a business behavior gap is found, reports it as a follow-up task instead of changing service code.
Does not modify business service, controller, DTO, entity, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, or deploy files.

tasks.title: Trial launch safety IoT alert visibility and energy evidence
acceptance: Runs or documents safe execution of S5 safety and S9 IoT / energy smoke coverage.
Records evidence for unified action executor, automatic hazard visibility, alert visibility, duplicate-prevention behavior, and energy billing reversal.
Documents write-path data safety and cleanup approach before running local or pre-production smoke.
If business behavior fails, reports the failing assertion and proposed follow-up instead of modifying service code.
Does not modify business service, controller, DTO, entity, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, or UI files.

tasks.title: Trial launch RBAC menu and dashboard visibility evidence
acceptance: Runs or documents RBAC, role-permission, first-release menu whitelist, and dashboard visibility checks.
Maps each RBAC/menu result to the production readiness matrix and identifies any No-Go blocker.
Documents any production-only manual sampling that still requires human approval.
If a menu or permission implementation gap is found, reports a follow-up task instead of changing app code.
Does not modify apps/api, apps/web, packages, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, or deploy files.

tasks.title: Trial launch release smoke rollback file and backup evidence
acceptance: Creates release-chain evidence for migration command shape, production seed approval, init baseline, bootstrap-admin, prod health, and container login verification.
Records file upload/download readiness and file backup evidence requirements without touching production data by default.
Records rollback owner, previous image tag evidence requirement, database backup evidence requirement, observation window, and Docker cleanup evidence requirement.
Clearly marks commands that require human approval before execution.
Does not run deploy, Docker cleanup, production seed, destructive cleanup, database reset, or production write-path e2e without human approval.
